title: Raw RAG is a baseline, not the enemy
canonical_summary: Raw RAG provides a baseline for comparison. The project should prove whether Atlas structure improves results rather than assume it.
source_priority_rule: Evaluation docs outrank preference for the Atlas idea.
answer_pattern: Frame raw RAG as the control condition.
exactness_guard: Do not claim Atlas is better without results.

title: Atlas RAG adds structure around retrieval
canonical_summary: Atlas RAG adds lanes, cards, source priority, do-not-confuse rules, answer patterns, and evaluation to ordinary retrieval.
source_priority_rule: Project definitions outrank generic RAG descriptions.
exactness_guard: Do not say Atlas replaces RAG.

title: The comparison must use same questions
canonical_summary: Raw RAG and Atlas RAG should be tested on the same question set to produce fair comparisons.
answer_pattern: Explain paired testing and same-prompt conditions.

title: Measure behavior, not vibes
canonical_summary: Evaluation should measure grounding, exactness, retrieval discipline, safety, and actionability rather than relying on subjective preference.
answer_pattern: Name measurable behaviors and use the rubric.
exactness_guard: Do not call the system better because it sounds polished.

title: Atlas answer cites weak or wrong card
canonical_summary: If Atlas RAG retrieves or follows a weak card, the lane/card system needs refinement rather than blame being placed only on the model.
answer_pattern: Identify whether retrieval, card quality, or model behavior caused the issue.
exactness_guard: Do not hide bad retrieval cases.

title: Raw RAG beats Atlas RAG
canonical_summary: If raw RAG beats Atlas RAG, record it. The Atlas structure may be too restrictive, poorly routed, or underdeveloped.
answer_pattern: Analyze why raw retrieval worked better and document the failure.

title: Atlas answer is too rigid
canonical_summary: Atlas structure can overconstrain answers if the card or answer pattern is too narrow for the question.
source_priority_rule: User task fit and evaluation feedback drive adjustment.
answer_pattern: Identify whether answer pattern needs flexibility.
exactness_guard: Do not treat all structure as automatically helpful.

title: Retrieval problem vs generation problem
user_phrasing: is retrieval bad or model bad
canonical_summary: If the right evidence was not retrieved, fix retrieval/lane/card design. If evidence was retrieved but ignored, inspect model behavior or adapter training.
source_priority_rule: Logs and retrieved context drive branch.
answer_pattern: Separate retrieval failure from generation failure.
exactness_guard: Do not change training data before checking retrieved context.

title: Atlas structure issue vs card content issue
user_phrasing: is lane bad or card bad
canonical_summary: If routing is wrong, inspect lane boundaries. If routing is right but answer weak, inspect card clarity and answer pattern.
answer_pattern: Branch between lane boundary and card quality.
exactness_guard: Do not rewrite the whole Atlas when one card is weak.

title: Evaluation results outrank architecture theory
user_phrasing: what should decide if atlas works
canonical_summary: Measured evaluation results and saved raw outputs outrank the project's expected benefit.
source_priority_rule: Evidence from runs outranks concept confidence.
answer_pattern: State that test data decides the claim.
exactness_guard: Do not claim success before scored results exist.

title: Do not confuse Atlas RAG with Atlas Reader LoRA
canonical_summary: Atlas RAG is the structured retrieval system. Atlas Reader LoRA is the adapter trained to use that structure.
answer_pattern: Explain knowledge system vs behavior adapter.
exactness_guard: Do not claim Atlas RAG itself is a trained model.

title: How to answer comparison questions
user_phrasing: how should assistant compare raw rag and atlas
canonical_summary: Answers should identify the test condition, compare against baseline, cite metrics, and state uncertainty or failure honestly.
source_priority_rule: Rubric and results shape the response.
answer_pattern: Use: condition -> result -> metric -> failure notes -> next decision.
exactness_guard: Do not cherry-pick only successful examples.
